name: IT Asset Disposition
tagline: Secure · Auditable · Compliant Corporate Hardware Retirement
description: End-to-end ITAD for Kochi enterprises. Asset tagging, certified data destruction, remarketing, and full chain-of-custody documentation.
longDescription: Our IT Asset Disposition (ITAD) service in Kochi is built on the pillars of data security and environmental responsibility. We help Kochi's growing tech hubs manage the lifecycle of their hardware while staying compliant with the DPDP Act 2023.

name: Data Destruction
tagline: NIST 800-88 Certified · Data Wiping & Physical Shredding
description: NIST 800-88 & DoD 5220.22-M certified data wiping and physical HDD/SSD shredding. Certificate of Destruction issued for every device.
longDescription: We provide industrial-grade data destruction in Kochi. From software purging to physical industrial shredding, we ensure your company data never falls into the wrong hands.

name: Hard Drive Shredding
description: Physical industrial shredding of HDDs, SSDs, NVMe drives and all storage media. Data 100% unrecoverable. Ideal for banks and hospitals.
longDescription: For Kochi organizations requiring maximum security, our physical shredding service renders memory chips into dust. 100% irreversible destruction verified by CoD.

name: E-Waste Recycling
tagline: KSPCB Authorised · Zero Landfill · Free Bulk Pickup
description: Certified e-waste recycling for homes and businesses in Kochi. We collect, dismantle, and recycle all electronic waste responsibly.
longDescription: As Kochi's #1 authorised recycler, we ensure zero landfill for electronics. We recovered critical materials like gold and copper from Kerala's electronic waste streams.

name: Sell Old Laptops
description: Get the best buyback price for old laptops, MacBooks, gaming laptops in Kochi. Instant valuation, same-day payment.
longDescription: We provide the highest resale value for your used laptops in Kochi. All devices are data-wiped using NIST-certified protocols before any potential resale.
